summary.shape_sentence: Morning upside drive failed into a midday breakdown, followed by afternoon balance and a modest late reclaim that closed below the open.

goat.note: Marked as midday LONG, but the actual reference behavior was a failed reclaim into downside continuation.

red_circles.behavior: Bearish pivots appeared at failed reclaims, especially around the noon break below 28,708 and afternoon resistance.

green_circles.behavior: Bullish pivots appeared after flushes but mostly produced traps or partial recoveries rather than a full trend reversal.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply near 28,790-28,900 was broken during the morning drive, then became overhead resistance after the midday failure.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand near 28,708 was broken after noon; lower demand around 28,575-28,610 helped form the afternoon base.

time_markers.10am_blue: Above VWAP and breaking higher, confirming the morning bullish drive.
time_markers.12pm_red: Rollover from the morning range; GOAT marker aligned with the transition into downside pressure.
time_markers.2pm_green: Controlled balance below broken support after the 13:30 washout.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Late recovery attempt into the close, but still below the open and well below the morning HOD.

takeaway: Bearish reversal day after a strong morning drive: upside breakout failed into a noon breakdown, then price built lower afternoon value with only a partial late reclaim.
